case_title: NIANI MITCHELL VS. GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,611.39 FILED BY MITCHELL, NIANI AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50) SERVED JAN-06-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL IANTORNO, MEMBER. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NIANI MITCHELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL IANTORNO, OWNER. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS COURT FOR CONTINUANCE AND IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF RECEIVED NEW EVIDENCE AND NEEDS TO DETERMINE IF DEFENDANT IS THE CORRECT PARTY TO SUE. COURT ORDERS CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
